purpose: Close the phase-04 presentation/components SearchBar authority rows using existing target endpoints and source-reviewed not-applicable evidence.

set.sourceBehavior: Source review found no runtime permission request, permission callback, or protected API access in SearchBar; the composable only owns a remembered search text field and leading icon.
set.targetBehavior: No permission flow was introduced in the HarmonyOS search bar because renderSearchBar only binds a visible query string to a Search input and emits text-change callbacks.
verificationEvidence: Source review: D:/Kotlin2Cangjie/Foodike/app/src/main/java/com/example/foodike/presentation/components/SearchBar.kt contains only local mutableStateOf text, a TextField, placeholder text, and a leading search icon.
Target review: entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/common/widgets/search_bar.cj contains only a Search component with onQueryChange wiring; no permission API is referenced.
Manual classification: this permission row is a static-analysis false positive on a pure search-input component.
set.notes: SearchBar is a pure text-input widget in both source and target; there is no protected platform access to translate.

manualEvidence.detail: Reviewed SearchBar.kt and search_bar.cj; both are search-input components without permission-gated behavior.

set.sourceBehavior: Source review found no settings/preferences persistence, option toggles, or configuration state in SearchBar; the composable only remembers the current text field value for the visible search input.
set.targetBehavior: No preference or configuration toggle was added to the HarmonyOS search bar because renderSearchBar remains a stateless query-input widget fed by route-owned state.
verificationEvidence: Source review: D:/Kotlin2Cangjie/Foodike/app/src/main/java/com/example/foodike/presentation/components/SearchBar.kt only keeps a local text string for the TextField value; it does not read or write settings/preferences.

Target review: entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/common/widgets/search_bar.cj plus bootstrap_page.cj keep query state in-memory for immediate UI refresh only, with no persisted preference or toggle behavior.
Manual classification: this settings row is a static-analysis false positive on a simple search field component.
set.notes: Phase-04 search state is local/route-owned UI state, not a preference or settings contract.

manualEvidence.detail: Reviewed SearchBar.kt, search_bar.cj, and bootstrap_page.cj; they contain only transient UI query state, not settings/preferences behavior.

set.sourceBehavior: SearchBar owns a remembered text state and updates it immediately through onValueChange so the visible query text recomposes in place as the user types.
set.targetBehavior: The HarmonyOS search bar preserves the same immediate UI propagation contract by rendering the current query through renderSearchBar and updating route-owned @State in FoodikeBootstrap on each onQueryChange callback.
verificationEvidence: Source review: D:/Kotlin2Cangjie/Foodike/app/src/main/java/com/example/foodike/presentation/components/SearchBar.kt uses remember { mutableStateOf("") } and assigns text = it inside TextField.onValueChange for immediate recomposition.

Target review: entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/common/widgets/search_bar.cj emits onQueryChange from Search.onChange, and entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/app/bootstrap_page.cj stores homeSearchQuery/historySearchQuery as @State that rerender renderHomeRoute/renderHistoryRoute immediately.

Test harness blocked after compile: the latest reported cjpm test command for target tests fails in ld.lld with missing Scrt1.o/crti.o/libm/libc before phase-04 tests can be counted as PASS, so this row relies on direct endpoint review instead of test-pass evidence.
set.notes: The target hoists search query state to route-owned @State instead of storing it inside the widget, but preserves the same user-visible immediate text update semantics.

testEvidence.detail: The latest workflow test report for cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos fails during ld.lld link with missing Scrt1.o/crti.o/libm/libc before phase-04 tests can run.

manualEvidence.detail: Compared SearchBar.kt remembered text state with renderSearchBar callback wiring and FoodikeBootstrap @State updates for home/history routes.

set.sourceBehavior: SearchBar presents a single-line search input with a visible "Search" placeholder and leading search icon, updating the current query text on every input change.
set.targetBehavior: The HarmonyOS translation preserves the search-input behavior with renderSearchBar, which shows the same visible placeholder text and forwards each query edit into route-owned state consumed by home and history discovery routes.
verificationEvidence: Source review: D:/Kotlin2Cangjie/Foodike/app/src/main/java/com/example/foodike/presentation/components/SearchBar.kt renders a single-line TextField with placeholder "Search", a leading Icons.Outlined.Search icon, and onValueChange text updates.

Target review: entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/common/widgets/search_bar.cj renders a Search input with placeholder "Search" and onChange callback, and bootstrap_page.cj wires the updated query into renderHomeRoute and renderHistoryRoute.

Phase evidence: D:/workspace/Foodike/translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-04-home-history-discovery/build-report.json records a passed build for the phase containing the search bar routes, while direct endpoint review confirms the per-feature behavior.
set.notes: Source SearchBar does not perform repository-backed filtering; the target preserves the same visible query-entry behavior without inventing backend search semantics.

buildEvidence.detail: verification-results.md records a passed build gate for phase-04-home-history-discovery at translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-04-home-history-discovery/build-report.json.

manualEvidence.detail: Compared SearchBar.kt with search_bar.cj plus route wiring in bootstrap_page.cj/home_page.cj/history_page.cj to confirm visible search-input parity.
